bottom_line: Add a guard in gate orchestration to avoid re-running already-passed QV gates when no code delta exists.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available (iw db-identity check: UP; item-status read). Read all small logs in full. For larger logs (S10 run4/run5, S11 run3/run8, S12 run1), sampled with grep plus targeted head/tail/line-window reads around anomalies.

findings.title: Duplicate QV reruns after successful completion
findings.recommendation: Short-circuit gate reruns when the prior run passed and no new worktree diff/commit exists since that run.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S06_run1.log:1-4 — 'uv run python scripts/check_templates.py ... Completed CR-00088 step S06'
ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S08_run1.log:1-3 and ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S08_run2.log:1-3 — identical format-check rerun
ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S09_run1.log:1-3 and ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S09_run2.log:1-3 — identical typecheck rerun
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Prevent redundant QV gate reruns by skipping already-passed gates when no code delta exists; analyzed in CR-00088 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00088/reports/CR-00088_self_assess_report.md). Target file: orch/daemon/batch_manager.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: Unit gate aborted by optional anthropic import at module load
findings.recommendation: Keep optional SDK imports guarded and add a boundary test enforcing that unit test modules import without optional providers installed.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S10_run1.log:14-22 — 'ERROR collecting tests/unit/test_llm_judge_script.py ... ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'anthropic''
ai-dev/logs/CR-00088_S10_fix1.log:5 — same missing anthropic cause noted in fix-cycle summary
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add regression coverage for optional-provider import safety so unit test collection does not fail when anthropic is absent; analyzed in CR-00088 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00088/reports/CR-00088_self_assess_report.md). Target file: tests/unit/test_llm_judge_script.py. Effort: S.
